name: Yext
highlight_text: Best suited for: Enterprises and Large Businesses
description:
What Yext Does? 

Yext’s reputation management solutions enable businesses to monitor and enhance their online presence across various platforms. Their offerings include tools for consolidating reviews from multiple sites, responding to feedback, and generating new reviews. Yext’s platform also provides insights into reputation trends and integrates with other services to streamline the management process.

Source:G2

Features:

  • Centralized management for monitoring, filtering, and labeling reviews from various platforms.
  • AI-powered options for automating review responses.
  • Tools for sending review requests to customers.
  • Comprehensive training and resources available for reseller partners.
  • API connectors for seamless integration with different platforms.

Pros:

✅ User-friendly with streamlined, templated processes.

✅ Efficient with quick submissions and numerous automated workflows.

✅ Well-organized analytics and reporting.

Cons:

❌ Can be expensive, especially for new partners seeking cost-effective solutions.

❌ Support may be slow and inadequate despite Yext’s extensive operations.

❌ Reports include Yext’s branding, which can reveal the underlying platform to clients, potentially reducing the white-label experience.

Pricing:

$48 per location per month for brands; custom pricing is available for resellers.
